mapper.sql: category_id, category_name, category_code, category_description, parent_id, category_level, sort_order, is_active, enterprise_id, creator_id, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.category_code, c.category_description, c.parent_id, c.category_level, c.sort_order, c.is_active, c.enterprise_id, c.creator_id, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, p.category_name AS parent_name, COUNT(s.script_id) AS script_count, COUNT(child.category_id) AS child_count FROM datacloud_script_category c LEFT JOIN datacloud_script_category p ON c.parent_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN datacloud_script s ON c.category_id = s.category_id LEFT JOIN datacloud_script_category child ON c.category_id = child.parent_id WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.is_active = 1 GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.category_level ASC, c.sort_order ASC

SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.category_code, c.category_description, c.parent_id, c.category_level, c.sort_order, c.is_active, c.enterprise_id, c.creator_id, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, p.category_name AS parent_name, COUNT(s.script_id) AS script_count, COUNT(child.category_id) AS child_count FROM datacloud_script_category c LEFT JOIN datacloud_script_category p ON c.parent_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN datacloud_script s ON c.category_id = s.category_id LEFT JOIN datacloud_script_category child ON c.category_id = child.parent_id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_categories, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 END) AS active_categories, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = 0 THEN 1 END) AS inactive_categories, COUNT(CASE WHEN parent_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS root_categories, COUNT(CASE WHEN parent_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS child_categories FROM datacloud_script_category WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
